title: YTP - Wizenheimer screams like an idiot
description:
Well, he's fed up getting his name pronounced incorrectly.

I got a little inspired from WolfySnackrib's clips, so I tried to make my own mix.
Though some could consider this film as a short Youtube Poop.

Mixed with clips from a Super Mario World episode, and a screaming voice from a Swedish movie called Ronja Rövardotter (based on a book by Astrid Lindgren).
